prompt: Bar Graph Comparison. White background. Two groups of bars side by side. Left group (labeled 'BEFORE'): 3 bars (60px wide, grey #9E9E9E), heights 120px, 160px, 100px. Right group (labeled 'AFTER'): 3 bars (60px wide, green #4CAF50), heights 200px, 280px, 180px. Labels: small text above each group. Animation (8s): 0-2s: Labels appear. 2-5s: Left bars grow sequentially (1s each). 5-8s: Right bars grow sequentially (1s each), showing improvement. Total duration: 8s. [cite: 453, 454, 455, 456, 457]

Circles Merge Split. Light background. Two circles: red (#F44336, 120px) and blue (#2196F3, 120px). Start separated 200px apart horizontally. Animation (8s): 0-2s: Both appear. 2-4s: Move toward each other, overlap at center. 4-5s: While overlapping, blend colors (overlapping area becomes purple). 5-6s: Merge into single purple circle (140px). 6-8s: Splits back into red and blue, separate to original positions. Total duration: 8s. [cite: 444, 445, 446, 447, 448]

Triangle Stack Pyramid. White background. Six triangles (each 140px base, yellow #FDD835), arranged in pyramid: row 1 (bottom): 3 triangles. Row 2 (middle): 2 triangles. Row 3 (top): 1 triangle. All pointing up. Animation (9s): 0-1.5s: Bottom row appears (3 triangles simultaneously). 1.5-3s: Middle row drops in from above, stacks on bottom row. 3-4.5s: Top triangle drops in, completes pyramid. 4.5-6.5s: Entire pyramid sways gently (rotates ±5° wobble). 6.5-9s: Each triangle rotates 180° sequentially bottom to top (pointing down), then flips back. Total duration: 9s. [cite: 487, 488, 489, 490, 491, 492, 493]

Line Star Formation. Black background. Center point. Twelve lines (each 250px long, 2px thick, white), radiating from center at 30° intervals (forming 12-point star burst). Animation (8s): 0-6s: Lines appear sequentially clockwise, each drawing outward from center over 0.5s (12 lines x 0.5s = 6s). 6-8s: All lines rotate together as formation 30° clockwise. Total duration: 8s. [cite: 512, 513, 514, 515]

Lines Perpendicular Weave. Black background. Four horizontal lines (each 400px, 3px, white) and four vertical lines (each 400px, 3px, white), forming woven pattern with over/under crossings. Animation (10s): 0-5s: Horizontal lines draw left to right sequentially (1.25s each). 5-10s: Vertical lines draw top to bottom sequentially (1.25s each), appearing to weave over/under horizontal lines (achieved through z-index layering or draw order). [cite_start]Total duration: 10s. [cite: 592, 593, 594, 595, 596]

Complex Coordinated Finale. Black background. Center: Large circle (200px, gold #FFD700 outline 4px, no fill). Around it: 8 triangles (each 100px, different rainbow colors) pointing toward center, positioned radially (240px from center, 45° apart). Animation (12s): 0-2s: Center circle appears and pulses (scale 100% -> 110% -> 100%). 2-6s: Triangles appear sequentially clockwise (0.5s each). 6-8s: All triangles rotate 180° simultaneously (now pointing away from center). 8-10s: Triangles orbit clockwise around circle, maintaining formation, 90° orbit. 10-12s: All triangles move toward center, all shapes fade out together. Total duration: 12s. [cite_start]Grand finale testing all coordination techniques. [cite: 613, 614, 615, 616, 617, 618, 619]

Grouped Bar Chart - Monthly Sales Comparison. Background white (#FFFFFF). Title 'Product Sales by Month' centered, 32pt bold (#2c3e50), 50px from top. Six month groups (Jan–Jun) each with 3 vertical bars: Product A blue (#2196F3), Product B green (#4CAF50), Product C orange (#FF9800). Bar width 45px, 8px gaps within group, 30px between month groups. Target heights: Jan (A 150px, B 120px, C 100px), Feb (A 170px, B 140px, C 110px), Mar (A 140px, B 130px, C 120px), Apr (A 180px, B 150px, C 140px), May (A 160px, B 170px, C 130px), Jun (A 190px, B 180px, C 160px). Baseline at 75% y. X-axis month labels (Jan–Jun) white 20pt on semi-transparent background. Y-axis labels 0, 50, 100, 150, 200 (white 16pt). Horizontal gridlines 1px white, 0.2 opacity. Legend top-right (Product A blue, B green, C orange, 12pt white). Canvas 1920×1080px. Animation (12s): 0–0.5s title fades in, 0.5–1s legend fades in. 1–8s month groups appear sequentially (Jan 1–1.8s, Feb 1.8–2.6s, Mar 2.6–3.4s, Apr 3.4–4.2s, May 4.2–5s, Jun 5–5.8s). Within each month, 3 bars grow from 0 to target with 0.05s stagger and ease-out. 8–9s value labels above each bar (12pt white) count 0→target. 9–10s X-axis labels fade in. 10–12s hold final chart. [cite_start]Total duration: 12s.

Stacked Bar Chart - Revenue Breakdown. Background dark navy (#1a237e). Title 'Revenue by Stream' centered, 32pt bold white (#FFFFFF), 50px from top. Four quarter columns (Q1–Q4), each stacked with segments: Cloud (blue #2196F3), Licensing (green #4CAF50), Services (purple #9C27B0). Total heights: Q1 120px (Cloud 60px, License 35px, Services 25px), Q2 140px, Q3 160px, Q4 180px. Baseline at 75% y. X-axis labels Q1–Q4 (white 22pt on semi-transparent background). Y-axis labels 0, 40, 80, 120, 160 (white 16pt). Horizontal gridlines 1px white, 0.15 opacity. Legend on right side showing three streams (12pt white). Canvas 1920×1080px. Animation (11s): 0–0.5s title and legend fade in. 0.5–1s Y-axis labels fade in. 1–6s stacked bars build quarter-by-quarter (Q1 1–1.8s, Q2 1.8–2.6s, Q3 2.6–3.4s, Q4 3.4–4.2s). In each quarter, Cloud grows first from baseline, then Licensing grows atop it, then Services, with ease-out. 6–8s segment value labels appear inside each segment (white 14pt bold) with counting animation. 8–9s X-axis labels fade. 9–11s hold with subtle white glow on all bars. [cite_start]Total duration: 11s.

Pie Chart - Market Share Distribution. Background white (#FFFFFF). Title 'Market Distribution 2024' top-center, 28pt bold (#333333), 50px from top. Pie chart diameter 400px, centered at 50% x and 55% y. Six touching slices: Electronics 32% (#FF6B6B), Software 25% (#4ECDC4), Services 18% (#45B7D1), Support 15% (#FFA07A), Training 7% (#98D8C8), Other 3% (#F7DC6F). Slice borders 2px white between slices. Labels at slice midpoints offset 3px from edge: product name (14pt bold white) plus percentage (16pt bold white). Legend below pie: 12pt labels with 12px color squares. Canvas 1920×1080px. Animation (9s): 0–1.5s background circle (outline only) fades in, no fill. 1.5–7s slices appear sequentially counterclockwise starting at 12 o'clock; each slice rotates in from 0° to final angle over 0.8s with 0.3s stagger and ease-out, label fades in with its slice. Each slice gets a 2px drop shadow (#000000, 0.3 opacity). 7–8s legend fades in below pie. 8–9s hold with subtle shadow pulsing on slices. [cite_start]Total duration: 9s.

Donut Chart - Budget Allocation with Center Text. Background light blue (#E3F2FD). Title 'Budget Distribution' top-center, 30pt bold (#1565C0), 40px from top. Donut outer diameter 380px, inner hole diameter 160px, centered at 50% x and 55% y. Five segments: Personnel 40% (#E74C3C), Operations 25% (#3498DB), Marketing 18% (#2ECC71), Research 12% (#F39C12), Admin 5% (#95A5A6). Segment borders 2px white, outer ring thickness 110px. Center text: 'Total Budget' (16pt bold white) and '$2.5M' (28pt bold #1565C0) stacked in donut hole. Legend on right side (12pt white with color squares). Canvas 1920×1080px. Animation (10s): 0–0.5s title fades in. 0–1s donut hole appears, inner circle radius animates 0→160px. 1–6s donut segments appear clockwise; each segment rotates from 0° to final angle over 0.7s with 0.4s stagger, plus 2px glow shadow (#000000, 0.2 opacity). 6–7.5s center text fades in with scale 0.8→1.0, '$2.5M' counts from 0 to 2.5M over 1s. 7.5–9s legend fades in. 9–10s hold with pulsing shadow on ring. [cite_start]Total duration: 10s.

Line Chart - Single Trend Over Time. Background dark (#1a1a1a). Title 'Website Traffic 12 Months' top-left, 28pt bold white (#FFFFFF), 40px from top. Chart area 1200×500px, positioned 100px from left and 150px from top. X-axis labels Jan–Dec (18pt white) centered under each month. Y-axis on left: 0, 5K, 10K, 15K, 20K, 25K (18pt white, right-aligned 20px left of chart). Horizontal gridlines at 5K intervals (1px white, 0.2 opacity). Data line: blue (#2196F3), 4px stroke, smooth curve through points 8K, 9K, 11K, 13K, 15K, 17K, 18K, 19K, 20K, 21K, 22K, 23K. Markers: 8px circles, white fill with blue border 2px. Canvas 1920×1080px. Animation (11s): 0–0.5s title fades in. 0.5–1s axes (Y labels + gridlines) fade in. 1–8s line traces left-to-right along data path over 7s, linear timing, with markers appearing as line reaches each point. 8–9.5s value labels ('XXK', 12pt bold white) above markers fade in with counting animation if needed. 9.5–10s X-axis labels fade in. 10–11s hold with marker glow pulsing (0.3s cycle). [cite_start]Total duration: 11s.

Multi-Line Chart - Product Performance Comparison. Background dark grey (#2a2a2a). Title 'Product Growth Comparison' centered top, 30pt bold white (#FFFFFF), 40px from top. Chart 1200×500px, 100px from left, 150px from top. X-axis: Month 1–10 labels (18pt white). Y-axis: 0–100 units in 20-unit increments (16pt white). Horizontal gridlines 1px white, 0.2 opacity. Three lines: Product A green (#27AE60, 3px) with data 10,15,22,28,35,40,48,55,62,70; Product B blue (#2196F3, 3px) with 20,24,26,30,32,38,42,45,48,52; Product C orange (#FF9800, 3px) with 15,18,20,19,22,25,28,26,29,32. Markers: 6px circles, white fill with colored border. Legend top-right (12pt white) for three products. Canvas 1920×1080px. Animation (12s): 0–0.5s title and legend fade in. 0.5–1s axes fade in. 1–4s Product A line draws left-to-right over 3s, markers appear as it progresses. 4–7s Product B line draws over 3s showing comparison. 7–10s Product C line draws over 3s. 10–11s value labels (11pt white) appear on markers with counting animation. 11–12s hold with marker glow pulsing. [cite_start]Total duration: 12s.

Area Chart - Revenue Trend. Background dark navy (#0d1b3c). Title 'Monthly Revenue Trend' top-center, 32pt bold white, 40px from top. Chart 1200×500px, positioned 100px from left and 150px from top. X-axis: Jan–Dec labels (18pt white). Y-axis: $0, $10K, $20K, $30K, $40K, $50K (16pt white). Horizontal gridlines 1px white, 0.15 opacity. Area fill: blue (#2196F3) gradient from solid at top to 0.1 opacity at bottom. Line stroke: #1565C0, 4px. Data: 15K,18K,22K,28K,32K,38K,42K,40K,45K,48K,52K,55K, smooth curve. Markers: 8px white circles with #1565C0 borders. Canvas 1920×1080px. Animation (10s): 0–0.5s title fades in. 0.5–1s axes fade in. 1–7s area fills from left to right over 6s, bottom edge extends rightward with gradient appearing, line border appears simultaneously. 7–8s markers fade in with scale 0.8→1.0. 8–9s value labels above markers ($XXK, 12pt white) count 0→value. 9–10s hold with marker glow pulsing. [cite_start]Total duration: 10s.

Funnel Chart - Sales Conversion Stages. Background white (#FFFFFF). Title 'Sales Funnel Q3' top-center, 32pt bold (#2c3e50), 40px from top. Five funnel stages centered horizontally with decreasing widths: Awareness 1000px (100%), Interest 750px (75%), Consideration 550px (55%), Evaluation 350px (35%), Purchase 150px (15%). Each stage height 80px with 20px vertical gaps. Color gradient from top to bottom: Awareness blue (#2196F3), Interest cyan (#00BCD4), Consideration green (#4CAF50), Evaluation orange (#FF9800), Purchase red (#E74C3C). Stage labels on left ('Awareness', 'Interest', 'Consideration', 'Evaluation', 'Purchase') 18pt bold white on semi-transparent dark background. Metrics on right: '50,000 visitors', '37,500 interested', '27,500 considering', '17,500 evaluating', '7,500 purchased' (18pt bold white). Baseline at 70% y. Canvas 1920×1080px. Animation (13s): 0–0.5s title fades. 0.5–1s baseline and guides appear. 1–8s stages appear top-to-bottom sequentially, each 0.8s long: width animates 0→target, height and color fade in with ease-out, borders sharpen to 2px white. 8–10s left labels fade in together. 10–11s right metrics fade in and count from 0. 11–13s hold with subtle inner glow on stage borders. [cite_start]Total duration: 13s.

Radar Chart - Product Feature Comparison. Background dark (#1a1a1a). Title 'Product Evaluation Matrix' top-center, 30pt bold white, 40px from top. Radar chart with 6 axes forming a hexagon, 420px diameter, centered at 50% x and 55% y. Axes: Performance (top), Reliability (top-right), Cost-Effectiveness (bottom-right), Customer Support (bottom-left), Innovation (top-left), Usability (horizontal left). Scores 0–100 on each axis. Gridlines: concentric hexagons at 20, 40, 60, 80, 100 (1px white, 0.2 opacity). Product A polygon: blue (#2196F3) connecting points (Performance 95, Reliability 90, Cost 70, Support 85, Innovation 92, Usability 88), fill 0.3 opacity blue, 2px blue border. Product B polygon: orange (#FF9800) connecting (Performance 80, Reliability 85, Cost 85, Support 80, Innovation 75, Usability 92), fill 0.3 opacity orange, 2px orange border. Axis labels at endpoints (14pt white bold). Legend on right side (12pt white) for A and B. Canvas 1920×1080px. Animation (12s): 0–0.5s title fades in. 0.5–2s grid hexagon rings draw in. 2–3s axis labels fade in. 3–8s Product A polygon traces clockwise from top over 2.5s, then fill fades in with 0.3s delay. 8–11s Product B polygon traces counterclockwise with slight offset, then fills. 11–12s legend fades in. Hold with subtle shadow pulsing on polygons. [cite_start]Total duration: 12s.

Bar Glow Emphasis - Highlighting Top Performer. Builds on Prompt 1 (vertical bar chart). At 4s mark, Q4 bar (highest value $70K) gets emphasis: bar shadow expands radially from 2px glow (#F44336 red) to 8px over 0.8s, pulsing in a 1s cycle. Bar border thickens from 1px to 3px white (#FFFFFF). Q1–Q3 bars fade to 0.5 opacity and slightly desaturate so only Q4 remains fully saturated. Q4 value label '$70K' scales from 20pt to 28pt bold and color shifts to gold (#FFD700). Behind the label, a semi-transparent highlight box appears (#FFF8DC yellow, 0.4 opacity, 4px padding). Animation timeline: 0–4s regular bar animation from Prompt 1. 4–4.8s glow expands, border thickens, label enlarges. 4.8–8s pulsing glow continues with other bars dimmed. Hold at 8s with Q4 emphasized. [cite_start]Total duration: 8s (extends base chart timeline).

Slice Pull-Out with Rotation - Pie Segment Emphasis. Builds on Prompt 5 (pie chart). At 5s mark, Electronics slice (32%, #FF6B6B, largest) pulls outward 50px radially from pie center and rotates +15° around its own center. A gradient overlay appears on this slice: edge bright #FF6B6B transitioning to darker #C62828 at center with radial falloff. Remaining slices (Software, Services, Support, Training, Other) fade to 0.4 opacity and desaturate. Glow appears around pulled slice (3px shadow #FF6B6B) pulsing with 0.8s cycle. An annotation arrow points to the slice with label 'Largest Market Segment' (12pt white bold in semi-transparent dark box). Animation: 0–5s normal pie animation from Prompt 5. 5–6s slice pulls out 50px, rotates +15°, gradient and glow appear. 6–7s other slices dim and label fades in with slight horizontal wiggle (±2px). 7–12s hold with pulsing glow and stable annotation. [cite_start]Total duration: 12s (including base pie motion).

Line Highlight Brightness - Top Performer Line. Builds on Prompt 8 (multi-line chart). At 7s mark, Product A line (green #27AE60, highest performer) is emphasized. Its stroke width increases from 3px to 5px and color deepens (#27AE60→#1B5E20). A 2px glow shadow (#27AE60) appears and pulses. Product B and C lines fade to #CCCCCC at 0.3 opacity and lose shadow. Markers on Product A enlarge from 6px to 10px and glow brightly. Value labels on A's points grow from 12pt to 16pt bold and recolor to gold (#FFD700). Background gridlines behind A's region brighten (1px white at 0.3 opacity instead of 0.2). Animation: 0–7s normal chart animation from Prompt 8. 7–8s A line brightens, thickens, and glows while B/C dim. 8–9s A's markers scale up and labels enlarge with value emphasis. 9–14s hold with Product A marker glow pulsing (0.4s cycle). [cite_start]Total duration: 14s (including base chart motion).

Area Fill Spotlight - Illuminating Data Section. Builds on Prompt 9 (area chart). At 6s mark, area under curve receives a 'spotlight' effect. A radial gradient overlay appears: center bright/transparent white transitioning to outer dark grey (#333333, 0.5 opacity), positioned at the highest point of the revenue curve. This brightens peak months (Jul–Dec) while early months (Jan–Jun) fall under a 0.4 opacity dark overlay. Area fill in spotlight region brightens (blue #2196F3→bright cyan #00BCD4), while shadowed region darkens (blue→#0D47A1). Line stroke in spotlight region gains 2px white glow. Animation: 0–6s normal area animation from Prompt 9. 6–7.5s spotlight radial gradient appears, early months darken. 7.5–9s area colors shift to bright in spotlight and dark in shadow. 9–14s hold with subtle shadow pulsing (0.3s cycle, intensity 0.4→0.6). [cite_start]Total duration: 14s (including base area motion).

Stacked Segment Flash - Individual Segment Emphasis. Builds on Prompt 4 (stacked bar chart). At 5s mark, Services segment (purple #9C27B0) in Q4 bar is emphasized. That segment gets a 2px white border and 3px white glow shadow pulsing every 0.8s. Other segments in the same Q4 bar drop to 0.6 opacity. Services segments in Q1–Q3 subtly highlight (opacity 0.8). A marketing label appears beside Q4 bar with arrow pointing to Services: 'Services Revenue: $18K' (12pt white bold in semi-transparent box). Animation: 0–5s normal stacked bar animation from Prompt 4. 5–6s Q4 Services segment gains border and glow while neighboring segments dim. 6–8s arrow and label fade in with slight scale-up. 8–12s glow continues pulsing at 1s cycle. Hold with emphasized segment visible. [cite_start]Total duration: 12s (including base stacked bar motion).

Product Launch Reveal. Dark navy background (#0A0E27). A large white circle (200px) is the hero element — it slides in from the left side over 1.5s. Below it, a bold white text label 'LAUNCH' (fontSize 48, bold) drops in from the top over 1s starting at t=0.5. After the circle arrives, it pulses 3 times (amplitude 0.12) from t=2 to t=5. Then both the circle and label fade out from t=6 to t=7. Total duration: 7s.

Four Icons Grid Bounce. Deep purple background (#1A0033). Four colored squares (120px each) arranged in a 2x2 grid: top-left red (#E53935) at pos [-160,-120], top-right blue (#1E88E5) at pos [160,-120], bottom-left green (#43A047) at pos [-160,120], bottom-right orange (#FB8C00) at pos [160,120]. Each square bounces in with staggered timing: red at t=0, blue at t=0.4, green at t=0.8, orange at t=1.2. Each bounce-in lasts 0.8s. After all appear, the red square shakes (amplitude 25, 3 cycles) from t=2.5 to t=3.5. Finally all four fade out from t=5 to t=6. Total duration: 7s.
Phase 3B feature test: statGrid generator (4 KPI cards), processFlow generator (4-step pipeline), progress_bar components (3 bars), callout_box component, badge components. Full dashboard layout.
Rocket launch full scene. Tests shape:asset with assetId:rocket, and parent-child scene graph (flame follows rocket). Stars, moon, launch pad, rocket lifts off with flame and smoke.
